useFieldUpload > clearErrors > removes only entries with error messages
useFieldUpload > dismiss > removes the specific entry
useFieldUpload > dismissAll > clears all entries
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles > returns uploaded result on successful upload

useFieldUpload > uploadFiles > tracks upload progress percentage
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles > opens XHR with correct method and URL

useFieldUpload > anti-forgery token > returns empty string when no token input exists in DOM
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles with TUS enabled > uses TUS when tusEnabled is true
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles with TUS enabled > uses filePath when TusFileInfo omits mediaPath
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles with TUS enabled > handles TUS progress event

useFieldUpload > uploadFiles with TUS enabled > rejects when TUS file info request fails

useFieldUpload > uploadFiles with TUS enabled > uses configured chunk size when maxUploadChunkSize > 0
useFieldUpload > auto-remove on success > schedules entry removal via setTimeout and callback removes entry
